title: Mobile Dental Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Mobile Dental Care 18 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with blood pressure tests, dental, vision, general wellness, and mammogram appointments. Provides limited basic personal care items such as soap, shampoo, and toothpaste 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Call Center Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Walk in hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-1pm, Monday/Thursday by appointment only Email (503) 591-9025 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH DENTAL CARE REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to access dental services through one of the community partners or through the dental van, which is periodically on site 450 Tatone Street Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 481-5444 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS OF BENTON AND LINN COUNTIES BENTON HEALTH CENTER DENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for overall health and prevention such as cleanings, x-rays, fillings, extractions, periodontics, and dental health education. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-0123 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-time pediatric dentist, with access to local specialists for emergency referrals. Capable of managing comprehensive patient care in the clinic and coordinating referrals for specialized treatment. Operates a mobile medical and dental bus twice a month at various locations on the Warm Springs Reservation. Offers a range of pediatric specialty programs, including the Silver Nitrate Project for children ages 0–6 with active tooth decay. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm, Wednesday 1pm-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm. Mobile medical and dental bus locations and times vary. (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dental care such as diagnostic, preventive, restorative, oral surgery, endodontic, fixed, and removable prosthetics. Also can deliver dental treatment to non-ambulatory patients in care facilities and private homes. 16500 SE 15th Street Suite 150 Vancouver, WA 98683 Eligibility: Age 55 and older or any age who are homebound or in need of a wheelchair-accessible clinic Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (360) 326-3829 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides fillings and extractions only. 4900 NW Hwy 99 Suite 102 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are experiencing oral pain, are low-income, and have no dental insurance Hours: Helpline: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 757-8111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MEDICAL TEAMS INTERNATIONAL MOBILE DENTAL VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent dental care services through a mobile dental van program. Primary services are extractions and fillings designed to get the patient out of pain. Dental clinics do not provide teeth cleanings, root canals, crowns, dentures, or bridge work. 14150 SW Milton Court Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: -Children and adults in urgent need of dental care who lack dental insurance or a realistic way to pay for treatment -Household income must be no higher than 200% of the federal poverty level and/or the patient must have no private insurance -Some sites may have additional eligibility requirements.
